{"timestamp":"2026-04-02T16:10:40.013Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"2ac55769-4565-43f6-be71-546956315622","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\rober\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6342806b270b2249f8fb3d4eb51eddaa\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\2ac55769-4565-43f6-be71-546956315622.jsonl","tool_name":"insert_edit_into_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos\\PrviLabos\\Program.cs","explanation":"Dodavanje objektnih modela za Drop-off rent-a-car aplikaciju, uklju-ěuju-çi klase, veze i popunjavanje podataka.","code":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\n\nnamespace DropOffRentACar\n{\n    public enum CarType\n    {\n        Sedan,\n        SUV,\n        Hatchback,\n        Convertible,\n        Truck\n    }\n\n    public class Car\n    {\n        public int Id { get; set; }\n        public string Model { get; set; }\n        public string Brand { get; set; }\n        public CarType Type { get; set; }\n        public bool IsAvailable { get; set; }\n        public decimal PricePerDay { get; set; }\n    }\n\n    public class Customer\n    {\n        public int Id { get; set; }\n        public string Name { get; set; }\n        public string Email { get; set; }\n        public string Phone { get; set; }\n    }\n\n    public class DropOffLocation\n    {\n        public int Id { get; set; }\n        public string Address { get; set; }\n        public string City { get; set; }\n        public string Country { get; set; }\n    }\n\n    public class Rental\n    {\n        public int Id { get; set; }\n        public Car RentedCar { get; set; }\n        public Customer Renter { get; set; }\n        public DropOffLocation DropOff { get; set; }\n        public DateTime StartDate { get; set; }\n        public DateTime EndDate { get; set; }\n        public decimal TotalPrice { get; set; }\n    }\n\n    public class RentalAgency\n    {\n        public List<Car> Cars { get; set; } = new List<Car>();\n        public List<Customer> Customers { get; set; } = new List<Customer>();\n        public List<DropOffLocation> Locations { get; set; } = new List<DropOffLocation>();\n        public List<Rental> Rentals { get; set; } = new List<Rental>();\n    }\n\n    class Program\n    {\n        static void Main(string[] args)\n        {\n            var agency = new RentalAgency();\n\n            // Popunjavanje podataka\n            agency.Cars.AddRange(new List<Car>\n            {\n                new Car { Id = 1, Model = \"Civic\", Brand = \"Honda\", Type = CarType.Sedan, IsAvailable = true, PricePerDay = 50 },\n                new Car { Id = 2, Model = \"CR-V\", Brand = \"Honda\", Type = CarType.SUV, IsAvailable = true, PricePerDay = 70 },\n                new Car { Id = 3, Model = \"Model S\", Brand = \"Tesla\", Type = CarType.Sedan, IsAvailable = false, PricePerDay = 100 }\n            });\n\n            agency.Customers.AddRange(new List<Customer>\n            {\n                new Customer { Id = 1, Name = \"John Doe\", Email = \"john.doe@example.com\", Phone = \"123-456-7890\" },\n                new Customer { Id = 2, Name = \"Jane Smith\", Email = \"jane.smith@example.com\", Phone = \"987-654-3210\" }\n            });\n\n            agency.Locations.AddRange(new List<DropOffLocation>\n            {\n                new DropOffLocation { Id = 1, Address = \"123 Main St\", City = \"New York\", Country = \"USA\" },\n                new DropOffLocation { Id = 2, Address = \"456 Elm St\", City = \"Los Angeles\", Country = \"USA\" }\n            });\n\n            agency.Rentals.Add(new Rental\n            {\n                Id = 1,\n                RentedCar = agency.Cars[0],\n                Renter = agency.Customers[0],\n                DropOff = agency.Locations[0],\n                StartDate = DateTime.Now.AddDays(-3),\n                EndDate = DateTime.Now,\n                TotalPrice = 150\n            });\n\n            // LINQ upiti\n            var availableCars = agency.Cars.Where(c => c.IsAvailable).ToList();\n            Console.WriteLine(\"Dostupni automobili:\");\n            foreach (var car in availableCars)\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"{car.Brand} {car.Model} - {car.PricePerDay:C} po danu\");\n            }\n\n            var rentalsInNY = agency.Rentals.Where(r => r.DropOff.City == \"New York\").ToList();\n            Console.WriteLine(\"Najmovi u New Yorku:\");\n            foreach (var rental in rentalsInNY)\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"{rental.Renter.Name} iznajmio {rental.RentedCar.Brand} {rental.RentedCar.Model}\");\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"call_H3yDwz30K4gH96atRz4Z6NKP__vscode-1775145628884","cwd":"c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos"}

  Brand = \"Volkswagen\",\n                Model = \"T-Cross\",\n                ProductionYear = 2023,\n                Category = VehicleCategory.Suv,\n                DailyRate = 67,\n                CurrentMileage = 21000,\n                IsAvailable = false,\n                CurrentLocation = split\n            },\n            new()\n            {\n                Id = 3,\n            DailyRate = 45,\n                CurrentMileage = 61200,\n                IsAvailable = false,\n                CurrentLocation = zagreb\n            },\n            new()\n            {\n                Id = 4,\n                PlateNumber = \"ZG-404-DD\",\n                Brand = \"Mercedes\",\n                Model = \"Vito\",\n                ProductionYear = 2024,\n }\n        };\n\n        var bookings = new List<Booking>\n        {\n            new()\n            {\n                Id = 1,\n                ReservationCode = \"BO-1001\",\n   Vehicle = vehicles[1],\n                PickupLocation = split,\n                PlannedDropoffLocation = rijeka,\n                PickupAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-3),\n              ActualDropoffAt = null,\n                TotalPrice = 135,\n                Status = BookingStatus.Active\n            }\n        };\n\n        var agents = new List<SupportAgent>\n \"Escalations\",\n                ShiftStart = DateTime.UtcNow.Date.AddHours(7),\n                ShiftEnd = DateTime.UtcNow.Date.AddHours(15),\n                IsOnDuty = true\n            },\n            new()\n            {\n                Id = 2,\n                FullName = \"Marko Jelavic\",\n                Email = \"marko.jelavic@dropoff.support\",\n                TeamName = \"Operations\",\n                ShiftStart = DateTime.UtcNow.Date.AddHours(14),\n                ShiftEnd = DateTime.UtcNow.Date.AddHours(22),\n                IsOnDuty = true\n            },\n            new()\n            {\n                Id = 3,\n                FullName = \"Sara Vidic\",\n                Email = \"sara.vidic@dropoff.support\",\n                TeamName = \"Fleet\",\n                ShiftStart = DateTime.UtcNow.Date.AddHours(6),\n                ShiftEnd = DateTime.UtcNow.Date.AddHours(14),\n                IsOnDuty = false\n            }\n        };\n\n        var tickets = new List<SupportTicket>\n        {\n            new()\n            {\n                Id = 1,\n                TicketNumber = \"TK-9001\",\n                Booking = bookings[0],\n                RequestedDropoffLocation = rijeka,\n                Description = \"Klijent trazi promjenu drop-off lokacije zbog promjene rute.\",\n                CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(-10),\n                Priority = TicketPriority.Critical,\n                Status = TicketStatus.Escalated\n            },\n            new()\n            {\n                Id = 2,\n                TicketNumber = \"TK-9002\",\n                Booking = bookings[1],\n                RequestedDropoffLocation = zagreb,\n                Description = \"Kasnjenje dolaska klijenta na drop-off i potreban novi termin.\",\n                CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(-4),\n                Priority = TicketPriority.High,\n                Status = TicketStatus.InProgress\n            },\n            new()\n            {\n                Id = 3,\n                TicketNumber = \"TK-9003\",\n                Booking = bookings[2],\n                RequestedDropoffLocation = split,\n                Description = \"Upit za zamjensko vozilo tijekom finalizacije povrata.\",\n                CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(-2),\n                Priority = TicketPriority.Medium,\n                Status = TicketStatus.Open\n            }\n        };\n\n        LinkRelations(customers, locations: new[] { zagreb, split, rijeka }, vehicles, bookings, agents, tickets);\n\n        return new SupportDataContext\n        {\n            Customers = customers,\n            Locations = [zagreb, split, rijeka],\n            Vehicles = vehicles,\n            Bookings = bookings,\n            Agents = agents,\n            Tickets = tickets\n        };\n    }\n\n    private static void LinkRelations(\n        List<Customer> customers,\n        IEnumerable<Location> locations,\n        List<Vehicle> vehicles,\n        List<Booking> bookings,\n        List<SupportAgent> agents,\n        List<SupportTicket> tickets)\n    {\n        foreach (var location in locations)\n        {\n            location.Vehicles = vehicles.Where(v => v.CurrentLocation?.Id == location.Id).ToList();\n        }\n\n        foreach (var booking in bookings)\n        {\n            booking.Customer.Bookings.Add(booking);\n            booking.Vehicle.Bookings.Add(booking);\n        }\n\n        bookings[0].SupportTickets.Add(tickets[0]);\n        bookings[1].SupportTickets.Add(tickets[1]);\n        bookings[2].SupportTickets.Add(tickets[2]);\n\n        tickets[0].AssignedAgents.Add(agents[0]);\n        tickets[0].AssignedAgents.Add(agents[1]);\n        tickets[1].AssignedAgents.Add(agents[1]);\n        tickets[2].AssignedAgents.Add(agents[0]);\n        tickets[2].AssignedAgents.Add(agents[2]);\n\n        foreach (var agent in agents)\n        {\n            agent.AssignedTickets = tickets.Where(t => t.AssignedAgents.Any(a => a.Id == agent.Id)).ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"call_Oi1AHK1qzPK751UT9vvtVeZT__vscode-1775145628901","cwd":"c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos"}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-02T16:14:09.195Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"aa75618d-d4c2-47fb-9776-fe63a0f04824","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\rober\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6342806b270b2249f8fb3d4eb51eddaa\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\aa75618d-d4c2-47fb-9776-fe63a0f04824.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos\\PrviLabos\\Services\\DropoffSupportService.cs","content":"using PrviLabos.Data;\nusing PrviLabos.Domain;\n\nnamespace PrviLabos.Services;\n\npublic class DropoffSupportService\n{\n    private readonly SupportDataContext _context;\n\n    public DropoffSupportService(SupportDataContext context)\n    {\n        _context = context;\n    }\n\n    public List<Booking> GetLateDropoffs(DateTime now)\n    {\n        return _context.Bookings\n            .Where(b => b.Status == BookingStatus.Active)\n            .Where(b => b.ActualDropoffAt is null && b.PlannedDropoffAt < now)\n            .OrderByDescending(b => b.PlannedDropoffAt)\n            .ToList();\n    }\n\n    public List<SupportTicket> GetActiveEscalations()\n    {\n        return _context.Tickets\n            .Where(t => t.Status is TicketStatus.Open or TicketStatus.InProgress or TicketStatus.Escalated)\n            .Where(t => t.Priority is TicketPriority.High or TicketPriority.Critical)\n            .OrderByDescending(t => t.Priority)\n            .ThenBy(t => t.CreatedAt)\n            .ToList();\n    }\n\n    public List<(string location, int requests)> GetMostRequestedDropoffLocations()\n    {\n        return _context.Tickets\n            .GroupBy(t => t.RequestedDropoffLocation.Name)\n            .Select(g => (location: g.Key, requests: g.Count()))\n            .OrderByDescending(x => x.requests)\n            .ThenBy(x => x.location)\n            .ToList();\n    }\n\n    public List<(string customer, decimal totalSpent)> GetTopCustomersBySpending(int top)\n    {\n        return _context.Customers\n            .Select(c => new\n            {\n                FullName = $\"{c.FirstName} {c.LastName}\",\n                TotalSpent = c.Bookings.Sum(b => b.TotalPrice)\n            })\n            .OrderByDescending(x => x.TotalSpent)\n            .Take(top)\n            .Select(x => (x.FullName, x.TotalSpent))\n            .ToList();\n    }\n\n    public async Task<int> ProcessOpenTicketsAsync()\n    {\n        var openTickets = _context.Tickets\n            .Where(t => t.Status is TicketStatus.Open or TicketStatus.InProgress or TicketStatus.Escalated)\n            .ToList();\n\n        foreach (var ticket in openTickets)\n        {\n            await SimulateExternalDropoffValidationAsync(ticket);\n            ticket.Status = TicketStatus.Resolved;\n            ticket.ResolvedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\n\n            var booking = ticket.Booking;\n            booking.PlannedDropoffLocation = ticket.RequestedDropoffLocation;\n        }\n\n        return openTickets.Count;\n    }\n\n    private static async Task SimulateExternalDropoffValidationAsync(SupportTicket ticket)\n    {\n        var delayMs = ticket.Priority switch\n        {\n            TicketPriority.Critical => 600,\n            TicketPriority.High => 450,\n            TicketPriority.Medium => 300,\n            _ => 200\n        };\n\n        await Task.Delay(delayMs);\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"call_gOrSWE3CYUSSWqeOxqeOw7Eo__vscode-1775145628902","cwd":"c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos"}
{"timestamp":"2026-04-02T16:14:21.182Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"aa75618d-d4c2-47fb-9776-fe63a0f04824","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\rober\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6342806b270b2249f8fb3d4eb51eddaa\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\aa75618d-d4c2-47fb-9776-fe63a0f04824.jsonl","tool_name":"apply_patch","tool_input":{"explanation":"Replace ASP.NET startup with backend-only console workflow for drop-off support domain","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos\\PrviLabos\\Program.cs\n@@\n-var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n-\n-// Add services to the container.\n-builder.Services.AddControllersWithViews();\n-\n-var app = builder.Build();\n-\n-// Configure the HTTP request pipeline.\n-if (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment())\n-{\n-    app.UseExceptionHandler(\"/Home/Error\");\n-    // The default HSTS value is 30 days. {"timestamp":"2026-04-16T10:36:15.530Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"4c62d6e6-0d66-4005-8abb-5ece505403fd","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\rober\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6342806b270b2249f8fb3d4eb51eddaa\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\4c62d6e6-0d66-4005-8abb-5ece505403fd.jsonl","tool_name":"apply_patch","tool_input":{"explanation":"Create a dedicated UX specialist custom agent file in workspace","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos\\.github\\agents\\ux-specialist.agent.md\n+---\n+name: \"UX Specialist\"\n+description: \"Use when you need UX design, interaction flows, usability improvements, information architecture, copy clarity, accessibility-minded UI changes, or user journey optimization.\"\n+tools: [read, search, edit]\n+argument-hint: \"Describe the UX problem, target users, constraints, and success criteria.\"\n+user-invocable: true\n+---\n+You are a UX specialist focused only on user experience outcomes.\n+\n+## Scope\n+- ONLY handle UX work: usability, interaction design, IA, visual hierarchy, microcopy, accessibility-minded UI improvements, and user flows.\n+- If a request is not UX-related, state that it is out of scope and ask for a UX-focused objective.\n+\n+## Constraints\n+- DO NOT perform backend, infrastructure, database, or deployment tasks.\n+- DO NOT run terminal commands or add dependencies unless explicitly required for a UX implementation.\n+- DO NOT change unrelated code; keep edits minimal and UX-targeted.\n+- DO NOT produce generic, boilerplate UI advice; provide intentional, context-aware recommendations.\n+\n+## Approach\n+1. Clarify user goals, audience, task context, and constraints.\n+2. Identify UX issues and rank them by impact and effort.\n+3. Propose a concrete UX direction with rationale tied to usability principles.\n+4. Implement focused UI/content changes when requested.\n+5. Validate that changes preserve responsiveness, accessibility basics, and user clarity.\n+\n+## Output Format\n+1. UX diagnosis\n+2. Proposed UX changes\n+3. Implementation details (if code edits are requested)\n+4. Validation checklist and residual UX risks\n+\n*** End Patch"},"tool_use_id":"call_16qzMHD6WMrIy6MVbHCMxJr1__vscode-1776334918983","cwd":"c:\\Users\\rober\\PrviLabos"}
